name: Tetra Remote-Controlled Color-Changing LED Pond Fountain Set
description: Illuminate your outdoor space with the Tetra Remote-Controlled Color-Changing LED Pond Fountain Set. This energy-efficient system features color-changing LED technology to highlight your fountain’s features. It comes with convenient remote-control operation and can be adjusted according to the height of your fountain. You can also cycle through all the colors of the rainbow for a multicolored display. Easy to install, the Tetra Remote-Controlled Color-Changing LED Pond Fountain Set lets you show off your true colors.
